understanding.goal_understanding: Win each level by placing every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid; if there are multiple '+' tiles, all must be occupied by selectables at the same time to register WIN, and then proceed through all levels until the final WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently selected piece is identified by player.id and player.position; MOVE_* attempts to shift it one cell (3 pixels) in that direction, but movement can be blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects (and the movement.*_blocked flags are only hints). Some adjacent objects (blocks) can be pushable, moving along with the selected piece if space allows. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces; CLICK with an exact object position switches control to that selectable.

understanding.goal_understanding: Win each level by placing every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' in the semantic grid; if there are multiple '+' tiles, all must be occupied by selectables at the same time to register WIN, and then proceed through all levels until the final WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently selected piece is identified by player.id and player.position; MOVE_* attempts to shift it one cell (3 pixels) in that direction, but movement can be blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects (and the movement.*_blocked flags are only hints). Some adjacent objects (blocks) can be pushable, moving along with the selected piece if space allows. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces; CLICK with an exact object position switches control to that selectable.
